testcase.name: @AfterMethod resetApp
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.UnhandledAlertException: unexpected alert open: {Alert text : You Have Succesfully Logged Out!!} (Session info: chrome=143.0.7499.170): You Have Succesfully Logged Out!!
